text.nodata_description: It looks like you don't have any certificates. Get started by running a workflow.

page.heading: Certificates
page.subheading: SSL certificates contain the website's public key and the website's identity, along with related information. They are generated from the execution output of workflows.

search.input.placeholder: Search by certificate name or serial number ...

revoke.modal.title: Revoke "{{name}}"
revoke.modal.content:
Are you sure want to revoke this certificate?
This action cannot be undone.

delete.modal.title: Delete "{{name}}"
delete.modal.content:
Are you sure want to delete this certificate?
This action cannot be undone.

batch_delete.modal.title: Delete certificates
batch_delete.modal.content:
Are you sure want to delete these {{count}} selected certificates?
This action cannot be undone.
